title: Make Python EDHOC sessions single-use
description: Recovery audit found stale completed exporter state survives object reuse and failed validation; session fields mutate before signature/message validation, permitting old or mixed OSCORE context export. Introduce explicit state/commit-after-validation semantics and malformed-message tests.
close_reason: Python EDHOC sessions are terminal, single-use, and commit state only after complete validation.
